intended_use: RTHawk is an accessory to 1.5T and 3.0T whole-body magnetic resonance diagnostic devices (MRDD or MR). It is intended to operate alongside, and in parallel with, the existing MR console to acquire tra
intended_use_full: RTHawk is an accessory to 1.5T and 3.0T whole-body magnetic resonance diagnostic devices (MRDD or MR). It is intended to operate alongside, and in parallel with, the existing MR console to acquire traditional, real-time and accelerated images. The HeartVista Cardiac Package is a collection of RTHawk Apps designed to acquire, reconstruct and display cardiovascular MR (CMR) images. RTHawk produces static and dynamic transverse, coronal, sagittal, and oblique cross-sectional images that display the internal structures and/or functions of the entire body. When interpreted by a trained physician, these images provide information that may assist in the determination of a diagnosis.
target_condition: cardiovascular conditions requiring cardiac MR imaging
other_metrics: SNR (Signal-to-Noise Ratio) and uniformity testing mentioned as part of performance testing; SAR < 4W/kg whole-body and dB/dt compliance stated
